physical_observation: After the first corner the car continued turning to an approximately 180 degree U-turn. The user lifted the car and it then stopped.
diagnosis: The first turn state exited at the 90 degree IMU target and recorded corner 1. The dangerous additional rotation occurred after transition back to SQUARE LINE, where the 120 mm/s V4 line controller repeatedly commanded near-pivot target splits. LINE LOST was the final consequence, not the initiating fault.
safety_action: STOP sent; turn parameters restored in RAM; current unsafe qualification parameters must not be rerun.
